title: Lithium producer Albemarle ups 2022 guidance on higher contract prices
text: Lithium producer Albemarle Corp. ALB, +2.75% late Monday upgraded its guidance for the year, mostly thanks to additional lithium contract renegotiations following blowout first-quarter earnings earlier this month. Albemarle said it expects fiscal 2022 sales between $5.8 billion and $6.2 billion, compared with a prior guidance of sales between $5.2 billion and $5.6 billion, and adjusted per-share earnings between $12.30 and $15, from $9.25 to $12.25 a share.
